rule: Every row cites exact source paths, not chat memory or citation numbers.
All analysis consumes staged/repaired outputs or read-only source evidence.
failure_action: stop and create separate approved repair/staging row

rule: No GCI for two-level, source-blocked, non-monotone, oscillatory, divergent, or invalid-order triplets.
HTC/UA/Nu cannot absorb heater, cooler, passive-loss, wall-storage, junction, or radiation residuals.
Forward predictive runs cannot use CFD mdot, realized CFD wallHeatFlux, or validation temperatures at runtime.
Salt2=train, Salt3=validation, Salt4=holdout unless a later admitted split package supersedes it.
failure_action: do not report final forward-v1 score

rule: Current CFD wallHeatFlux includes rcExternalTemperature radiation; do not add separate qr on top of realized wallHeatFlux.
Do not hide component, reset, redevelopment, cluster, or branch-apparent loss inside one global friction multiplier.
Rows with recirculation-cell behavior cannot be promoted as ordinary single-stream f/K/Nu closures without policy evidence.
Each gate-moving task writes status, journal, import manifest, package README, and index refresh when scoped.
